'''Asturias''' was a factory [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that had been abandoned by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The nearby [[Unidentified red giant (Asturias)|sun]] had turned into a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]], and its [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] rose to limits too dangerous for prolonged exposure for both biological and mechanical existence. Its sand-covered surface was littered with the decaying hulks of [[Starship/Legends|ships]] and buildings.

==History==
[[File:Asturias.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The surface of Asturias.]]
During the war, [[Director/Legends|Director]] [[Lorca Oviedo]] attempted to defect to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] by staging an attack on himself and his [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] escorts near and on the moon. Due to the clone commandos' efficiency the plan failed, though all but one of the commandos were killed. The last one, [[Zag]], succeeded in taking off the moon, along with Oviedo.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Asturias|The Principality of Asturias]] is a region in [[Wikipedia:Spain|Spain]] which includes the city of [[Wikipedia:Avilés|Avilés]]. [[Ian Edginton]] used this name in "[[Honor Bound]]" after he went to the [[Wikipedia:Salón del Cómic de Avilés|Salón del Cómic de Avilés]], a Spanish [[Wikipedia:Comic Con|Comic Con]]. Other names influenced by Edginton's visit were Lorca Oviedo and [[Aviles Prime]].
